subcodes.first_line: O blazing leaf! It is said that—in terms of their constitution, their nature, and their station—women are weaker than men and more fervent in their hopes
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مبتهله گویند که نساء در خلقت و طینت و منقبت اضعف از رجالند و اشد
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @firmness in the Covenant
